authors: Jose Mari Hall Lanuza Rossine Lyandre Yao C. Fallorina a University of Massachusetts Amherst
University of the Philippines Manilab University of the Philippines Diliman
raw_title: Against All Odds: Journalist Resistance against State Disinformation in the Philippines
title_en: Against All Odds: Journalist Resistance against State Disinformation in the Philippines
title_zh: 逆势而行：菲律宾记者对国家虚假信息的抵抗
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了菲律宾记者如何抵抗政府传播的虚假信息。尽管面临巨大压力，记者们仍在努力揭露真相，维护新闻自由。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how journalists in the Philippines resist government disinformation. Despite facing significant challenges, journalists continue to work to expose the truth and defend press freedom.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代下记者对抗国家虚假信息的策略与挑战，关注媒体自由在威权环境中的生存与发展。
research_direction_en: Investigating strategies and challenges for journalists combating state disinformation in the digital age, focusing on the survival and development of media freedom in authoritarian contexts.
